title: alsophila everta
intro: Alsophila everta, also known as the Tree Fern, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Cyathea and is native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Alsophila everta include its use in treating conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Alsophila everta is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and fronds can be dried and used in various forms of medicine.
